'''Norulac''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] with numerous [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges strewn all over its surface. Its lack of a strong government enabled various groups avoiding authorities elsewhere to take refuge on the planet.

[[Pirate/Legends|Pirate]]s from Norulac had been conducting seasonal raids on the planet [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]] until they were defeated by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] at the [[Battle of Taanab/Legends|Battle of Taanab]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places Norulac in the [[Xappyh sector/Legends|Xappyh sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].
